package rulecoverage

func PositiveWaitgroupFanoutWithoutErrgroupOnErrorPath() string {
    ruleID := "waitgroup_fanout_without_errgroup_on_error_path"
    family := "concurrency"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "WaitGroup-based goroutine fan-out that still carries explicit error-path coordination better suited to errgroup."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
